install.windows_download: Open https://windsurf.com/download in the browser, click the Windows installer. Saves to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads by default.
install.macos_download: Open https://windsurf.com/download in the browser, click the macOS download (.dmg). Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.linux_download: Open https://windsurf.com/download for the Linux build (tar.gz / AppImage). Extract and run per the docs.
install.note: GUI IDE — VS Code fork by Codeium. AI features and model selection are built into the app; Echobird does not switch its model.

install_flow.summary: winget if available → otherwise download installer → user runs the wizard
agent_steps: Windows: prefer `winget install --id Codeium.Windsurf` if winget is available — silent install.
Manual fallback: download the installer to the user's Downloads folder using `Invoke-WebRequest` (Windows) or `curl -L -o` (macOS/Linux).
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path.
Open the installer (`Start-Process` on Windows, `open` on macOS).
Tell the user: 'Windsurf 安装向导已打开,请按向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'The Windsurf installer is open — follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That the installer was opened or that winget is installing silently
That Windsurf handles its own model selection — Echobird does NOT switch models for it
